summary: Add behavior.branch_mode config (per-ticket | managed); managed skips git ops and branch guards
description: behavior currently holds only commit_prefix (src/config.ts) and branch enforcement is hardcoded via expectedBranchFor. Add behavior.branch_mode = per-ticket | managed. In managed mode, work behaves as --skip-branch (no git ops) and close skips checkOnExpectedBranch + checkBranchHasTodoCommit entirely. One coherent switch instead of a per-command --skip-branch tax. Do NOT add a flag per guard. Files: src/config.ts, src/types.ts (Config), src/commands/work.ts, src/commands/close.ts.
